summary: Frontend translation testing completed for Arabic to English language switch. All main pages (Dashboard, HR, Inventory, Delivery, Settings, Reports, Orders) are properly translated. Fixed one missing translation for 'نقص المخزون' (Low Stock) in Inventory page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation testing completed. All pages are properly translated when language is set to English via localStorage.setItem('app_language', 'en'). The remaining Arabic text on pages is user data (customer names, currency values, order details) which is expected.

Dashboard.remaining_arabic: User data only (customer names, currency values)

translated_elements: All tabs (Employees, Payroll Report, Attendance, Advances, Deductions, Bonuses, Payroll Sheets, Employee Ratings, Biometric Devices)
Table headers (Name, Phone, Title, Branch, Salary, Status, Actions)
Stats cards (Active Employee, Total Salaries, Pending Advances, Monthly Deductions, Monthly Bonuses, Payables)

Inventory.fix_applied: Added missing translation for 'نقص المخزون' -> 'Low Stock'

translated_elements: All tabs (Appearance, Restaurant, Home, Users & Staff, Customers, Branches, Categories, Products, Printers, Delivery Companies, Call Center, Notifications, Electronic Payment, Inventory Settings, System Settings, Invoice Settings)
Comprehensive reports for sales, expenses and profits
All tabs (Sales, Purchases, Expenses, Profits, Products, Delivery, Cancellations, Deductions, Refunds, Credit)
Stats cards (Total Sales, Total Costs, Total Profits, Number of Orders, Profit Margin, Average)
Status cards (Suspended, In Preparation, Ready, Delivered, Cancelled)
